style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like pollen in sunlight, forming delicate petal-shaped aura particles that pulse softly with a pastel pink and lavender glow. The aura emits a warm, ethereal luminescence that refracts light into rainbow hues around the wings, while faint musical note vibrations shimmer in the air as delicate, translucent notes float gently. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
